SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNDERLOH, KATHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOLIS, DAVID NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT IS INTENDED TO PRECLUDE PLAINITFF FROM SEEKING DAMAGES OR REIMBURSEMENT FROM THE THIRD PARTY CO-TENANT ANDR HER GUARANTOR DR.
